title: Section 1
content: 1[(1)] This Act may be called the Cantonments (Extension of Rent Control Laws) Act, 1957. 2[(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 26th day of January, 1950.]
footnote: 1. Section 1 re-numbered as sub-section (1) thereof by Act 22 of 1972, s. 2 (w.e.f. 26-1-1950). 2. Ins. by s. 2, ibid. (w.e.f. 26-1-1950).
